case_definition: Motor neurons from familial ALS SOD1 carriers
inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset als_cns_core because explicit table 1 motor-neuron comparison with accession-coded case and control counts.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/als_cns_core.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
